◎简　　介  

　　I Told You I Was Trouble: Live In London is a music DVD and Blu-ray disc of contemporary R&B singer Amy Winehouse, recorded at London's Shepherds Bush Empire in London, England. The DVD was released on 5 November 2007.Track listingLive in London title:Intro/"Addicted""Just Friends""Cherry""Back To Black""Wake Up Alone""Tears Dry On Their Own""He Can Only Hold Her""Doo...
